description:
Rio terminal is a hardware-accelerated GPU terminal emulator, focusing to run in desktops and browsers.

Rio terminal is a hardware-accelerated GPU terminal emulator, focusing to run in desktops and browsers.
The supported platforms currently consist of BSD, Linux, MacOS and Windows.
Changelog
- Fix: In some cases, the first typed character doesn't display until after a delay, or until another key is hit #1098.
- Fix: Anomalous behavior occurs with the Bookmark tab style in the new versions 0.14 and 0.13. #1094.

- 6f17a08 Always damage current cursor
- 39137ce Use both offset and render_offset in scale and update skrifa

- 944deae fix bookmark size (closes #1094)
- cf5a52e update release.md
